## Description

Describe the changes and architectural rationale. Note any direct impacts on numerical stability or VRAM footprint.

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] Performance optimization (CUDA kernel tweaks, memory tiering improvements)

## Hardware Validation

Given the nature of the VRL Framework, please specify the hardware used to validate this PR:
- **GPU Model(s):** 
- **VRAM Utilization delta:** (e.g., +200MB, -1.5GB)

## Checklist:

- [ ] Code adheres to the existing project style.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my code.
- [ ] Code is commented in complex areas.
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the `.md` documentation in the `/docs` directory.
- [ ] Added/updated relevant tests.
- [ ] All new and existing tests pass locally.
